How to fix monitor no signal after sleep

ada Jan 2, 2026 #1

My external monitor shows "no signal" after the laptop sleeps.

Any fixes? I tried this guide.

grace Moderator Jan 2, 2026 #2

Disable deep sleep for the monitor and update your GPU driver.

See the driver downloads page.

ada Jan 2, 2026 #3

Updating the driver fixed it. Thanks!
